entities.name: ICGV 92267
entities.description: An improved Spanish peanut germplasm line (Reg. no. GP-116, PI 630947) bred at ICRISAT

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Spanish peanut, scientifically known as Arachis hypogaea L. subsp. fastigiata var. vulgaris Harz

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization that bred and released the germplasm line

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where ICRISAT is located, specifically Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity quickly

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust in peanuts

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting peanut leaves

entities.name: PHAEOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes late leaf spot in peanuts

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental condition of cold temperatures during germination

entities.name: CHILL TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand low temperatures at germination
